Shared ARZ/PZZP decompression is implemented in packages/formats/src/arz.ts.

remainingBlockers: Decoded PZZ/ARZ payloads still need HSD/model and effect semantic mapping before they can drive sword/gun/projectile/powerup visuals.
PZZ members may contain ARZ-compressed payloads, so effect archive inspection has two layers: PZZ member table first, then ARZ decompression per compressed member.

matches.text: # Gotcha Force `.arc` model format — HSD DAT (HAL Sysdolphin)

Extracted from the user's GG4E disc → `afs_data.afs` → 1369 `.arc` files in `user-data/GG4E/afs_data/root/`. All facts below are computed from those real bytes; reproduction scripts in `/tmp/hsd_check.py`, `/tmp/pl_probe.py`, `/tmp/hsd_roots.py` (re-runnable).
| **Bare HSD DAT** | 182 | `arrow_mdl.arc`, `deck00_mdl.arc`, `box00_mdl.arc`, `collision.arc`, `cnd000_mdl.arc` | DAT header at offset 0 |
| **Wrapped HSD DAT** (`pl****_mdl.arc`) | 1187 | `pl0000_mdl.arc`, `pl0f06k_mdl.arc`, `pl0505k_mdl.arc` | 0x100-byte wrapper, then DAT at offset 0x100 |
**Root node entry (8 bytes):** `u32 dataOffset`, `u32 stringOffset` (offset into symbol table). For every `.arc`, rootCount=1 and the root name is **`scene_data`**.

`scene_data` root → sysdolphin scene struct → model set(s) → **JOBJ** (joint tree / skeleton) → **DOBJ** (display objects / meshes) → **POBJ** (polygon objects: GX display lists, vertex attribute descriptors) → **TOBJ/IMG** (textures, likely referencing the sibling `.tpl` files or embedded). This is the standard Melee/HSD model graph. GF may use game-specific fields inside `scene_data`, but the container + node typing is HSD.

- Note: this *supports* the "ARC = HSD Files" wiki label. It does NOT resurrect the separately-refuted claim "HSD statically linked into boot.dol" — file-format lineage and static-linkage are different claims.
Cloned `Ploaj/HSDLib`, built `HSDRaw` (netstandard2.0) with the only installed SDK (.NET 2.1), wrote a netcoreapp2.1 console probe. **HSDRaw parses Gotcha Force `.arc` files with ZERO modification.**
are present as member 003 inside `pl0008.pzz` / `pl000c.pzz`. Use

The actor/common record body is not semantically decoded yet. Treat it as a fixed-size record with named raw fields until gameplay code or traces identify actions, bones, hitbox shapes, damage, effect IDs, and timing.
- Validates record markers, normal lengths, record ref alignment, and record-section divisibility.
- Actor/common 0xF4 field meanings: flags, action IDs, damage, hitbox shape, bone/attachment IDs, effect IDs, and timing.
0x02, Buffer ref 0x04). `HSD_FOBJDesc` is the linked-list variant with an extra
HSD_A_J_PTCL=40                     // particle trigger, NOT a transform
exist in the format but are not transform tracks. PTCL is a particle-spawn opcode

Each borg ships a model (`plXXXX_mdl.arc`, HSD DAT) and an animation file (`plXXXXmot.bin`). The `mot.bin` is **NOT itself a single DAT** — it is a custom Gotcha Force container holding many independent HSD DAT blobs (one per animation clip), indexed by a two-level big-endian offset table at the front. Each clip-blob is a self-contained HSD DAT whose roots are **`HSD_AnimJoint`** trees (the same `pl****_bNN_animjoint` structure as Melee character animations), and HSDRaw parses them with zero modification.

- `animtest.exe <mot.bin> <arc> <skip> <blobOffHex> <modelIdx> <out.json>` — extracts a clip-blob, loads with HSDRaw, bakes per-bone TRS **per frame** (rest pose overridden by FOBJ tracks), emits JSON: `{frameCount, fps:60, rotFormat:"quat_xyzw", bones:[{i, pos:[xyz…], rot:[xyzw…], scl:[xyz…]}]}`. Bone `i` ↔ Collada node `JOBJ_i`.
- `user-data/GG4E/afs_data/root/efct.pzz` (572.0 KiB): PZZ unpacked, 3 member(s), payload kinds hsd-dat:2, tpl-texture:1.
- `user-data/GG4E/afs_data/root/efct00_mdl.arc` (408.2 KiB): bare HSD DAT, root(s): scene_data.
- `user-data/GG4E/afs_data/root/efct01_mdl.arc` (398.7 KiB): bare HSD DAT, root(s): scene_data.
